title: Christmas Horror
description:
Adds The Christmas Dweller, A mob for Christmas Horror and Pranking your friends!!!
Enjoy ;)
body:
This mod adds the Christmas Dweller, a horrifying monster! try to brave the horror and survive! This mod is a fan made recreation of the Christmas Dweller by ShadowMech on Curseforge I liked the mod but didn't like how it was only for Forge so I made this mod for Fabric. I hope you find this helpful and I wanted to give credit to the mod that inspiered this.

Note: This mod may still have some buggs as it is still in bata.

Note: This monster does not spawn naturally and will have to be summoned from the creative invetory or commands. 



Commonly asked qusetions

Can I make a port or remake this mod?  Yes, but you should keep it among you and your frineds and not publish a port or remake of this mod.
